title: CAoS: 12 ideas cosecha implementadas (IDEA-009 a IDEA-020)
motivation: Implementación de 12 ideas cosechadas (IDEA-009 a IDEA-020): SFX one-shot, sequences, letterbox cinematic bars, NPC portraits, autosave, TitleCard overlay, touch support, custom SVG cursors, ambient particles, item detail modal, NPC patrol paths y verb keyboard shortcuts.
ideas_implemented: IDEA-009: SFX one-shot (pendingSfx en store + AudioManager)
IDEA-012: Portrait en DialoguePanel (componente NPC por speaker ID)
IDEA-013: AutoSave en changeRoom + botón Save en HUD
IDEA-015: Touch support (tap + long press 500ms → VerbMenu)
IDEA-016: Custom SVG cursors via CSS data-uri injection
IDEA-018: Item detail modal con lore en InventoryPanel
IDEA-020: Verb keyboard shortcuts L/I/P/T en VerbMenu activo
